pages.text: You have already learned how to create an undead Illager caster—so why not transform your Sorcerer into one as well! Simply ensure your Sorcerer meets with a little accident while you are wearing the Nameless Set, and you can resurrect a Bound Sorcerer from the Ominous Idol. They retain their former level, and thanks to their lack of legs, they can fly!
Black Sorcerer, you wait for me! Just you wait!
